name: Alif Ramdani
role: Software Engineer | Scalable & Distributed Systems Specialist
description: 4+ years crafting high-performance, reliable and scalable microservices.
about: Backend engineer with 4+ years designing and shipping distributed systems at production scale: API gateways, async task pipelines, data warehouses, and microservice migrations. Focused on systems that are observable, reliable, and scalable.
